## - General Election Competitiveness

- Figures: `figs/[TYPE]/m-elect_primary-[1:4].png`

```{r}
#| label: m-elect_primary
#| fig-show: hold
#| out-width: 50%
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Per Year"
#| fig-subcap:
#|   - "Model 1: Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 2: Diff in Diff"
#|   - "Model 3: restricted Diff in Diff"
#|   - "Model 4: log Diff in Diff"

# cross-sectional 
m_elect_primary_cross <- fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    abs(nominate_dim1)+ 
    distance*presidents_party + 
    competitive + competitive_primary +
    majority | Year_x_Agency,
  cluster = "Legislator", 
  data = data_member)

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_elect_primary_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", stars = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_elect_primary_cross, horiz = T, drop = "(Intercept)") 



# 2
m_elect_primary_did <-fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    competitive + competitive_primary +
    presidents_party + majority  | Year_x_Agency + Legislator_x_Agency, 
  cluster = "Legislator",
  data = data_member)

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_elect_primary_did, gof_omit = "R.*", coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_elect_primary_did, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 


# 3
m_elect_primary_2nd_cross <-fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    abs(nominate_dim1)+ 
    distance*presidents_party + 
    competitive + competitive_primary + 
    majority | Year_x_Agency, 
  cluster = "Legislator", 
  data = data_member %>% filter(survive == 1))

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_elect_primary_2nd_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", coef_omit = coef_omit)}
coefplot(m_elect_primary_2nd_cross, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 


# 4
m_elect_primary_2nd_did <-fenegbin (
  perYear ~
    competitive + competitive_primary +
    majority + presidents_party | Year_x_Agency + Legislator_x_Agency,
  cluster = "Legislator",
  data = data_member %>% filter(survive == 1))

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_elect_primary_2nd_did, gof_omit = "R.*", coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_elect_primary_2nd_did, horiz = T, drop = ".theta")
```


### Table - elect_primaryoral 

```{r m-elect_primary-models}
models_elect_primary <- list(
  "(1)" = m_elect_primary_cross,
  "(2)" = m_elect_primary_did,
  "(3)" =  m_elect_primary_2nd_cross,
  "(4)" = m_elect_primary_2nd_did
)

rows <- tibble(
  term = c("Dependent Variable", 
           #"Majority",
           #"President's Party",
           "All House Reps.", 
           "Served At Least 2nd Term"),
  `(1)` = c("Count", "X", ""),
  `(2)` =c("Count", "X", ""),
  `(3)` = c("Count","", "X"),
  `(4)` = c("Count", "", "X") 
)

# subset
attr(rows, 'position') <- c(0, 20,21,22,23)

# call coefs
attr(rows, 'position') <- c(0)


# HTML
modelsummary(models_elect_primary, 
             title = "The Effect of Experience and District Competitiveness on Legislator Contacts", 
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator."))

beta_cross <- betas(m_elect_primary_cross)
se_cross <- standard_errors(m_elect_primary_cross)
beta_did <- betas(m_elect_primary_did)
se_did <- standard_errors(m_elect_primary_did)
```



### Modeled Effects - cross sectional 

```{r}
#| label: "m-elect_primary-effect"
#| fig-cap: "figs/[TYPE]/m-elect_primary-effect"
#| layout-ncol: 2
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 3.5
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "1"
#|   - "2"
#|   - "3"
#|   - "4"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-show: "hold"

model <- m_elect_primary_cross
data = data_member |> filter(year > 2007,  year < 2019)

plot_effect( 
  newdata = mutate(data, competitive_primary = 0),
  effect = "Competitive primary election"
)

```

### Modeled Effects - elect_primaryoral - diff in diff

```{r}
#| label: "m-elect_primary-did-effect"
#| fig-cap: "figs/[TYPE]/m-elect_primary-did-effect"
#| layout-ncol: 2
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 3.5
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "1"
#|   - "2"
#|   - "3"
#|   - "4"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-show: "hold"

model <- m_elect_primary_did
data = data_member #|> filter(year > 2007,  year < 2019)

plot_effect( 
  newdata = mutate(data, competitive_primary = 0),
  effect = "Competitive primary election\n(diff in diff)"
)

```
